violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Bucket/bottle sanitizer concentration not maintained at proper levels. Ensure dispenser is working properly.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice cream scoops stored in tepid water near ice cream freezer. Store utensils clean and dry, in product handle out, or in a running dipper well.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Bucket of chili in walk in cooler dated 12/11. Chicken wings not date marked in walk in cooler. Ensure proper date marking is accomplished. Container of coleslaw from manufacturer has use by date of 1/7/26.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Wire racks for smoker stored on floor next to utility sink and mop bucket. Store in a manner to protect from contamination. Lid to ice cream freezer stored on floor next to freezer. Cutting board used as prep surface stored on top of garbage can.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Invert to go containers at FOH prep station. Store spray bottle away from lids near ice cream storage. Store boxes of food service items off floor in dry storage room.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. Carpeting installed behind wet bar and in dry storage room where soda dispensing equipment is located.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in walk in cooler, BOH prep area, & FOH production line have a buildup of food/debris under equipment and shelving units and need cleaning. Carpeting behind bar and in dry storage matted and needs cleaning.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light fixtures at dish machine and above smoker prep table missing shield.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Store cleaning chemicals away from food service items on wire rack shelving in dry storage room.
